text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen has been pretty tired lately, so I
decide to bring her to the infirmary to get some
rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
G-good grief... You don't have to look after me
like I'm a child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I won't be able to fall asleep with you
hovering over me like so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Surely you're exhausted too. Please, go to your
own room and get some rest. Go on, now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's this? ...Perhaps I'm having a dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Is that... a plushie over there? It seems
familiar, somehow...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah! It's Usarina! Grandmother gave her to me a
long time ago!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, this brings back such fond memories...
Whenever I was sick, I'd snuggle up with her in
bed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The day that I moved and had to say goodbye, I
cried all night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But I've grown since then. I'm no longer a
crybaby, neither am I so sickly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And... the dreams I had back then have become
my determination.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My determination to achieve perfect victory as a
member of the Mejiro family!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing Mejiro McQueen's words, Usarina almost
seems to be smiling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that instant, a dazzling light fills the entire
area.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A perfect dream and a perfect awakening. I feel
as though strength is surging through me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her energy restored, Mejiro McQueen leaves
the infirmary with a spring in her step.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen's words don't seem to reach
Usarina, who simply sits there motionless.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I-I'm sorry. All I've done is talk about
myself... Um, uh... Well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she's trying to think of what to say, a dazzling
light fills the entire area...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah... Is this the infirmary?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So, that means it really was all a dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It was a rather sad one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to take her mind off the dream, Mejiro
McQueen fails to get an adequate amount of rest.
